title: Implement DAG Integrity Service
description: Create DagIntegrityService with Cypher-based cycle detection. Use shortestPath query to check if creating a new BRANCHED_FROM or MERGED_INTO relationship would introduce a cycle. Implement self-reference prevention (source == target). Ensure only version evolution relationships (BRANCHED_FROM, MERGED_INTO) are considered — exclude CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP, RELATES_TO, SYNTHESIZED_FROM.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN a new version evolution relationship is requested from node A to node B AND no existing path from B to A exists THEN allows creation; WHEN an existing path from B to A exists via BRANCHED_FROM or MERGED_INTO THEN rejects with DAG integrity violation; WHEN source_node_id equals target node_id THEN rejects with self-reference error; SHALL only consider BRANCHED_FROM and MERGED_INTO for cycle detection; ref: specs/dag-integrity/spec.md:4-45; ref: Doc/req.md:236 (§6.2 版本演进关系写入前必须做无环校验)
review_initial_requirements: design.md Decision 1: Cypher shortestPath over app-layer BFS; Cycle detection must be within same transaction as write (TOCTOU prevention); Verify exclusion of semantic relationships from cycle check
review_regression_requirements: Must not regress CGF lineage/provenance queries; Verify cycle detection performance for 50-hop DAG depth (MAX_ALLOWED_DEPTH); Concurrent write safety via Neo4j transaction isolation
refs: openspec/changes/decision-engine/specs/dag-integrity/spec.md; openspec/changes/decision-engine/tasks.md:1-3; Doc/req.md:236 (§6.2 无环校验); src/main/java/com/rhizodelta/service/NodeQueryService.java; design.md Decision 1; src/main/java/com/rhizodelta/service/DagIntegrityService.java:9; src/test/java/com/rhizodelta/service/DagIntegrityServiceUnitTest.java:18
notes:
P0 prerequisite for both merge and branch operations. CGF design.md explicitly deferred this as known risk. All subsequent decision tasks depend on this.
blocked_by:none
blocks:DE-03-01,DE-04-01
picked_reason:优先完成P0前置无环校验，先解除 merge/branch 核心路径阻塞
done_at:2026-03-08
acceptance:自引用拒绝、环路拒绝、无环放行
evidence:mvn test -Dtest=DagIntegrityServiceUnitTest + ServiceLayerUnitTest 均通过

title: Create Decision Command DTOs & Validation
description: Create MergeDecisionCommand record with compact constructor validation: decision_id, request_id, source_node_id, agent_version, summary_content, synthesized_from (List<UUID>), operator_type, operator_id, reason. Create BranchDecisionCommand record: decision_id, request_id, source_node_id, content, author_id, operator_type, operator_id, reason. Create DecisionResult record: decision_id, node_id, status. All blank/null required fields must throw IllegalArgumentException.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN MergeDecisionCommand created with blank decision_id THEN throws IllegalArgumentException; WHEN MergeDecisionCommand created with empty synthesized_from THEN throws IllegalArgumentException; WHEN BranchDecisionCommand created with blank content THEN throws IllegalArgumentException; WHEN valid commands created THEN all fields accessible; ref: specs/merge-decision-api/spec.md:38-44; ref: specs/branch-decision-api/spec.md:30-35; ref: Doc/req.md:181-191 (§5.5 决策API请求字段)
review_initial_requirements: Field names must match req.md §5.5 exactly; Validation pattern must follow CGF PostService.CreateHumanPostCommand style; operator_type should accept AGENT and HUMAN values
review_regression_requirements: Verify command records are immutable; Validate serialization/deserialization with Jackson for API layer
notes:
P0 DTOs are prerequisites for service and controller layers. Follow CGF record validation pattern.

title: Implement Merge Decision Service
description: Create DecisionService with executeMerge method. Validate source_node_id exists (Human_Post or AI_Consensus). Validate all synthesized_from node IDs exist as Human_Post. Use Neo4jClient to atomically: MERGE AI_Consensus by decision_id with ON CREATE SET for summary_content/agent_version/node_id/created_at; CREATE MERGED_INTO relationship to source node with audit metadata; CREATE N SYNTHESIZED_FROM relationships to contributing Human_Posts. Integrate DagIntegrityService cycle check before MERGED_INTO creation. Wrap in @Transactional.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid merge request submitted THEN creates AI_Consensus + MERGED_INTO + N SYNTHESIZED_FROM atomically; WHEN duplicate decision_id THEN returns existing node_id without duplicate creation; WHEN source_node_id not found THEN returns error; WHEN any synthesized_from ID not found THEN returns error; WHEN MERGED_INTO would create cycle THEN rejects with 409; ref: specs/merge-decision-api/spec.md:4-50; ref: Doc/req.md:181-185 (§5.5 POST /api/decisions/merge); ref: Doc/req.md:155 (§5.3)
review_initial_requirements: design.md Decision 2: Neo4jClient + Cypher (not repository.save); design.md Decision 3: decision_id as idempotency key via MERGE; design.md Decision 4: single transaction for node + all relationships; Verify AI_Consensus gets GraphNode label
review_regression_requirements: Verify SYNTHESIZED_FROM relationships carry correct audit metadata; Verify idempotency under concurrent duplicate requests; Transaction rollback on partial failure must leave no orphan nodes
notes:
P0 core merge logic. Most complex task — creates 1 node + N+1 relationships atomically.

acceptance:MERGE 以 decision_id 幂等创建 AI_Consensus，写入 MERGED_INTO + SYNTHESIZED_FROM，缺失 source/synthesized_from 抛错

title: Implement Branch Decision Service
description: Add executeBranch method to DecisionService. Validate source_node_id exists. Use Neo4jClient to atomically: MERGE Human_Post by decision_id with ON CREATE SET for content/author_id/node_id/request_id/created_at and GraphNode label; CREATE BRANCHED_FROM relationship to source node with audit metadata. Integrate DagIntegrityService cycle check before BRANCHED_FROM creation. Wrap in @Transactional.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid branch request submitted THEN creates Human_Post + BRANCHED_FROM atomically; WHEN duplicate decision_id THEN returns existing node_id without duplicate creation; WHEN source_node_id not found THEN returns error; WHEN BRANCHED_FROM would create cycle THEN rejects with 409; WHEN self-reference (source == new node) THEN rejects; ref: specs/branch-decision-api/spec.md:4-42; ref: Doc/req.md:187-191 (§5.5 POST /api/decisions/branch); ref: Doc/req.md:156 (§5.3)
review_initial_requirements: design.md Decision 5: DecisionService manages branch independently (not delegating to PostService); Verify Human_Post gets both Human_Post and GraphNode labels; Verify BRANCHED_FROM audit fields match CGF BranchedFromRelationship schema
review_regression_requirements: Verify branch node appears in lineage queries via existing GET /api/nodes/{id}/lineage; Transaction rollback leaves no orphan nodes; Idempotency under concurrent requests
notes:
P0 core branch logic. Simpler than merge — 1 node + 1 relationship.

title: Create Decision Controller & Exception Handling
description: Create DecisionController with @RestController at /api/decisions. Implement POST /merge accepting JSON body mapped to MergeDecisionCommand fields, returning ApiResponse<DecisionResult> with HTTP 202. Implement POST /branch accepting JSON body mapped to BranchDecisionCommand fields, returning ApiResponse<DecisionResult> with HTTP 202. Add DagIntegrityViolationException handler to GlobalExceptionHandler returning HTTP 409 Conflict with ApiResponse format.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN POST /api/decisions/merge with valid JSON THEN returns HTTP 202 with {code:0, data:{decision_id, node_id, status:QUEUED}}; WHEN POST /api/decisions/branch with valid JSON THEN returns HTTP 202 with same format; WHEN DAG integrity violation occurs THEN returns HTTP 409 with {code:40901, message:cycle detected}; WHEN malformed JSON submitted THEN returns HTTP 400 (covered by CGF GlobalExceptionHandler); ref: specs/merge-decision-api/spec.md:6-14; ref: specs/branch-decision-api/spec.md:6-12; ref: Doc/req.md:155-156 (§5.3); ref: Doc/req.md:131-139 (§5.1 统一响应结构)
review_initial_requirements: Follow CGF PostController pattern (HTTP 202 + ApiResponse); Request field names must use snake_case per req.md §5.5 convention; Add 409 error code constant to ApiResponse (40901 suggested)
review_regression_requirements: Verify error responses follow unified ApiResponse format; Verify existing POST /api/posts and GET endpoints not affected; Verify malformed JSON returns 400 (not 500) via CGF C4 fix
notes:
P1 controller layer depends on service completion. Follow CGF controller patterns.

title: Decision API Integration Tests
description: Extend PostApiIntegrationTest or create DecisionApiIntegrationTest with Testcontainers Neo4j. Tests: (1) successful merge creates AI_Consensus + MERGED_INTO + SYNTHESIZED_FROM with correct audit; (2) merge idempotency via duplicate decision_id; (3) merge validation errors (missing fields, non-existent nodes, empty synthesized_from); (4) successful branch creates Human_Post + BRANCHED_FROM with audit; (5) branch idempotency; (6) branch validation errors; (7) DAG cycle detection returns 409; (8) verify created nodes appear in existing lineage/provenance queries.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN running full test suite THEN all decision integration tests pass within 60s; WHEN merge test completes THEN AI_Consensus queryable via GET /api/nodes/{id} with label AI_Consensus; WHEN branch test completes THEN new node appears in lineage of source; WHEN cycle test submits circular branch THEN receives HTTP 409; ref: Doc/req.md:408-411 (§11.1 集成测试); ref: Doc/req.md:415 (§11.2 超时上限60秒)
review_initial_requirements: Test isolation: @BeforeEach must clean database; All tests must use Testcontainers Neo4j (not local instance); Verify audit metadata on relationships via direct Cypher queries in assertions; Test coverage must include both happy path and error cases
review_regression_requirements: Existing CGF tests must continue passing; Verify no test pollution between decision and post tests; 60s timeout per req.md §11.2
notes:
P1 integration tests validate end-to-end decision flow. Follow CGF PostApiIntegrationTest pattern.
